Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Frischer, Esq. 415-997-9529 for Plaintiff.
Seth Neulight, Esq. 415-984-8377 of Nixon Peabody LLP for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant Argues. Plaintiff responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE BAY CLUBS COMPANY LLC, WESTERN ATHLETIC CLUBS LLC'S Motion To Compel Arbitration AND TO STAY ACTION.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendants The Bay Clubs Company LLC and Western Athletic Clubs LLC's motion to compel arbitration is DENIED. Defendants have failed to show the existence of a valid agreement to arbitrate plaintiff Stefan Stefanov's claims. The language of the 2016 arbitration agreement is materially different from the language of the 2015 employment agreement with respect to the employee's right to opt out of arbitration. The language of the 2015 employment agreement states that Stefanov may "opt out of arbitration" if he does not wish to participate without any qualification of that right. The 2016 arbitration agreement states that it is a condition of employment and provides that the employee has the right to opt only of the PAGA claims. The arbitration agreement does not purport to rescind the 2015 employment agreement and attempts to modify the terms of employment without satisfying the conditions prescribed in the employment agreement for their effective change. The parties agreed on the method to amend the conditions of employment and the purported 2016 arbitration agreement is not a valid amendment. (See Rebolledo v. Tilly's, Inc. (2014) 228 Cal.App.4th 900, 924.) Therefore, the 2016 agreement does not change Mr. Stefanov's right to opt out of arbitration of his disputes with his employer.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)
